acceptance_criteria.when: sentinel is written via userprompt-consent-allowlist.sh and command /tmp/xlsx-venv/bin/python /root/orchestra/docs/dev/find_red_cells.py > /root/orchestra/docs/research/case-3 is attempted
acceptance_criteria.then: match_sentinel_grant_for_bash_command returns a non-None entry matching op=/tmp/xlsx-venv/bin/python; pretool-bash-safety.sh exits 0 with SENTINEL_OK

check.invocation: call match_sentinel_grant_for_bash_command(task_id, '/tmp/xlsx-venv/bin/python /root/orchestra/docs/dev/find_red_cells.py > /root/orchestra/docs/research/case-3') with a pre-written sentinel containing op='/tmp/xlsx-venv/bin/python'

acceptance_criteria.when: sentinel is written via userprompt-consent-allowlist.sh Step 4
acceptance_criteria.then: allowed_operations[0] in the written sentinel does NOT contain '> /root/output' in args_contain; args_contain contains only '/root/script.py' (pre-redirect argument only)

check.expected_result: args_contain does not contain '>' or the redirect target path

acceptance_criteria.given: user issues bare /allow (wildcard) which sets pattern='.*' is_regex=true
acceptance_criteria.then: EITHER no sentinel file is written at /tmp/claude-grants/<task_id>.json for this regex grant; OR sentinel is written with legacy_fallback_allowed=true. Legacy check_and_consume_allowlist IS consulted for the subsequent Bash command (SENTINEL_EXISTS_FOR_TASK remains 0).

check.invocation: verify /tmp/claude-grants/<task_id>.json absent after regex /allow, or present with legacy_fallback_allowed=true; then verify SENTINEL_EXISTS_FOR_TASK is not set to 1 for the subsequent command
check.expected_result: CF-1 suppression does not fire for regex grants

acceptance_criteria.given: a subagent (agent_id present in hook input) attempts to execute any Bash command
acceptance_criteria.then: function returns 1 immediately due to IS_SUBAGENT=1; legacy grant is never consulted; no change to this behavior

check.invocation: simulate hook input with agent_id set; verify check_and_consume_allowlist returns 1
check.expected_result: IS_SUBAGENT firewall for legacy grants preserved

acceptance_criteria.given: settings.json is updated with Bash(/tmp/*-venv/bin/python*:*) in allow list
acceptance_criteria.when: a command starting with any /tmp/*-venv/bin/python path is attempted
acceptance_criteria.then: Claude Code built-in permission check allows it without requiring /allow interaction

check.expected_result: matching entry present in allow array
